name_en: Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and trim meet 100% authentic raw materials.
name_cn:
Genuine factory-made, ZP-grade authentic quality. We ensure all materials, hardware, stitching, and trim meet 100% authentic raw materials.
M82766
POCHETTE ACCESSOIRES Handbag
Exclusive channel goods, exclusive ZP surplus stock, exclusive European channel goods
Large poker bag
This Pochette Accessoires handbag features a classic design in Monogram canvas, with a zip closure for ample space. It includes a zip pocket, slip pocket, and card slots for securely storing daily essentials. The leather shoulder strap and chain are detachable for multiple carrying styles.
Dimensions: 23.5 x 13.5 x 4 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas with leather trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Zip closure
Large compartment
Interior zip pocket
Interior slip pocket
Card slots
Shoulder strap: Detachable
Non-adjustable strap half-length: 25.0 cm
Chain: Detachable
Chain half-length: 25.0 cm
Includes full set of packaging
